arts.ttl: Chelsea to Be Only Club Without Shirt Sponsor at 2025 Fifa Club World Cup?
arts.sum: Chelsea FC is set to be the only participating team in the new enlarged 2025 FIFA Club World Cup to feature no front-of-shirt sponsor throughout the tournament.

arts.ttl: Latest Tottenham injury news before Chelsea clash after Dejan Kulusevski return hint
arts.sum: Dejan Kulusevski has sent a subtle injury return hint with Ange Postecoglou hoping to have him back available from for Tottenham's Premier League clash against Chelsea on Thursday. Lucas Bergvall missed out on playing for Sweden during the March international break due to illness but he is expected to be available this week.

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham plotting stunning £100m move to sign Premier League duo
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are preparing a major summer transfer move, with Wolves duo Matheus Cunha and Joao Gomes firmly in their sights. According to a report from TheBoyHotspur, Spurs are willing to allocate £100 million to secure both players as they look to overhaul their squad ahead of the new season.
